parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
participant browser
participant proxy
control backend
entity component_config
entity subscription_map
entity normalized_object_map
entity normalized_object

activate browser
browser -> proxy : 1 get_state(\n  configuration_name,\n  geo_bounding_box\n)
activate proxy
proxy -> backend : 2 +TENANT_HEADER
activate backend
backend -> component_config : 3 component_config[configuration_name]\n.subscription_usages
backend <-- component_config : 4 [ subscription_usage_config ]
backend -> subscription_map : 5 forEach subscription_usage_config.subscription_id
backend <-- subscription_map : 6 subscription_map[subscription_id] (= normalized_object_map)
backend -> normalized_object_map : 7 forEach key
backend <-- normalized_object_map : 8 normalized_object
backend -> normalized_object : 9 forEach normalized_object:\n  if object.in(geo_bounding_box):\n    object.to_dto(\n      subscription_usage_config\n    )
backend <-- normalized_object : 10 object_dto
proxy <-- backend : 11 [ object_dto ]
deactivate backend
browser <-- proxy : 12
deactivate proxy
deactivate browser
@enduml
```
